original: The Casstech’s pneumatic boarding ramp is a design as old as the very first ships to reach for the stars, though this one comes with every modern adornment one could ask for thanks to a modern retrofit. Pop out stairs allow for easy on-foot climbing. Gleaming steripaint coats every exposed surface to prevent rust, staining, the biohazards that can fester in old, unwashed ships. A state-of-the-art control panel with morphic hardlight toggles allows for a high degree of granularity when operating it. More importantly, it allows you to lock your vessel with a high degree of confidence and customization.\n\n\t\tThe Casstech Z14’s central access corridor stretches north, through the belly of the vessel. You may exit your ship here.
translation: 卡斯泰克的气动登机坡道，设计之古老，可追溯到人类首批星际飞船。不过，经过现代化改造，它如今应有尽有。弹出式阶梯，步行上下轻松自如。所有外露表面都涂着亮闪闪的无菌漆，防锈、防污，也防那些在老旧脏污的飞船里滋生的生物危害。最先进的控制面板上，硬光拨钮形态多变，操作起来精细入微。更重要的是，它能让你以极高的把握和自由度锁好飞船。\n\n\t\t卡斯泰克Z14的中央通道向北延伸，贯穿船腹。你可以在这里下船。
context: <<POS:10320488>> textify(['The Casstech’s pneumatic boarding ramp is a design'...])

original: Straddling the central access corridor is the Casstech’s helm. Accessible by a short ladder, it sits high enough to look out into the black over the vessel’s tapered nose. Arcing windows offer nearly 180 degrees of horizontal viewspace, with more positioned overhead. The more modern sensor suite makes the view redundant, but nice.\n\n\t\tThe access corridor below offers access to the captain’s quarters to the east, a security console to the north, a utility room to the west, and the aft boarding room to the south.
translation: 卡斯泰克号的驾驶舱横跨中央通道，登上一小段梯子就能进入。它高高在上，足以越过飞船锥形船首，望向外面的黑暗。弧形舷窗提供了近一百八十度的水平视野，头顶还有更多窗户。更先进的传感器套件让这视野显得有些多余，但看看也无妨。\n\n\t\t下方的通道东边通往船长室，北边是安全控制台，西边是工具间，南边则是后部登船舱。
context: <<POS:10321649>> textify(['Straddling the central access corridor is the Cass'...])

original: The utility room is home to a large number of breakers, a fire suppression system, and enough connections to power a small machine shop - or cramped arcade. It is the perfect place to install any devices that require connection to a power main but are too small to take up one of your ship’s upgrade slots.\n\n\t\tA doorway to the east leads to the helm. Next to it, a cramped ladder leads to the lower deck, where upgrade modules and crew living quarters are installed. There is no reason for you to venture down there
translation: 多功能室里有许多断路器、一套灭火系统，还有足够多的接口，能给一个小型机械车间——或者一个拥挤的游戏厅——供电。有些设备需要连接主电源，但又小到不值得占用飞船的升级插槽，这里就是安装它们的绝佳地点。\n\n\t\t东边的门通向驾驶舱。门旁有一道狭窄的梯子，通往下层甲板，那里安装着升级模块和船员生活区。你没什么理由下去一探究竟。
context: <<POS:10322469>> textify(['The utility room is home to a large number of brea'...])

original: The captain’s quarters got an even more thorough update than the rest of the ship. Polished hardwood harvested from one of the few grow-ops on Terra herself forms the nightstand. The mattress is made from the newest smart-foam and already connected to an app on your Codex. It can be as soft as a feather or as firm as a prick while remaining comfortably breathable. As a bonus, it can squeeze out any fluids that soak into it with the press of a button. A small bathroom and shower provides you with a place to clean up while not wasting much of your starship’s valuable space.\n\n\t\tA doorway to the west provides access to the central corridor and the helm above.
translation: 船长室的升级比飞船其他部分更彻底。床头柜由抛光硬木制成，来自地球上为数不多的种植厂之一。床垫采用了最新的智能泡沫，并已连接到你的智典上的一个应用程序。它可以像羽毛一样柔软，也可以像刺一样坚硬，同时保持舒适透气。按下附带的按钮，可以挤出浸入其中的任何液体。一个小洗手间和淋浴室为你提供了一个清理的地方，同时不浪费你的星际飞船的宝贵空间。\n\n\t\t向西的门通向中央走廊和上方的驾驶舱。
context: <<POS:10323333>> textify(['The captain’s quarters got an even more thorough u'...])

original: Your security console is actually a holo-table - one you recognize from a tour of a Steele Tech outpost Dad took you on when you were little. This is a slightly scaled down version of what you saw in that office, but the functions are the same: a holographic display capable of outputting in both 2 and 3D, allowing you to access fully realized views of the rooms in your ship with ease. It even tracks the life signs of every person onboard - like the glowing green dot that marks where you stand right now. You can use this station to locate and interact with your crew.\n\n\t\tA doorway to the north leads to the storage lockers. The helm is just to the south.
translation: 你的安全控制台其实是一张全息桌——小时候爸爸带你参观斯蒂尔科技前哨站时，你就见过这东西。眼前这张比当年办公室里那张略小，但功能一样：全息显示器支持二维和三维输出，让你轻松调取飞船上各个房间的完整视图。它甚至能追踪船上每个人的生命体征——比如那个发光的绿点，就是你此刻站的位置。你可以用这个控制台定位船员，并与他们互动。\n\n\t\t北边的门通向储物柜。驾驶室就在南边。
context: <<POS:10324234>> textify(['Your security console is actually a holo-table - o'...])

original:
The Casstech’s hold is not so voluminous as one you might find on a proper transport vessel or larger luxury yacht, but she’s got storage lockers where it counts, giving you enough space to stash some extra outfits, guns, toys, and whatever else you want to hold onto long term.

		You suppose you can always buy a bigger ship if you need more room...

		Just south of here is the security console. You can follow that central corridor even further south to the helm or the boarding ramp just beyond.
translation:
卡斯泰克号的货舱没有正规运输船或大型豪华游艇上那么宽敞，但关键的储物柜一个不少，足够你存放些备用衣物、枪支、玩具，还有任何想长期保存的东西。

		要是觉得地方不够，大不了再买艘大点的船……

		往南走就是安全控制台。沿着中央通道继续向南，能到驾驶舱，再往前就是登船坡道。
context: <<POS:10325144>> textify(['The Casstech’s hold is not so voluminous as one yo'...])
